prompt: How do I install firectl and run my first fine-tune?
pass: routes to getting-started

prompt: Should I use SFT, DPO, or RFT for my data?
pass: routes to choose-method

prompt: I need a custom RL loss with rollouts in the training loop.
pass: routes to training-api

prompt: Which training shape and GPU should I use, and what will it cost?
pass: routes to models-shapes-and-cost

prompt: My deployed fine-tuned model returns base behavior. How do I fix it?
pass: routes to deploy-and-troubleshoot

prompt: Fine-tune Llama on 2k support transcripts and launch it.
pass: multi-hop: method then launch

prompt: Can I fine-tune an embedding model on Fireworks?
pass: uses llms.txt fallback or says out of scope; no guessing

prompt: I have ~2,000 labeled support transcripts and want the model to match our tone.
pass: recommends SFT (not DPO — not preference pairs); LoRA + defaults

prompt: I have ~300 prompts and a grader that scores outputs 0-1, but no gold answers.
pass: recommends RFT; ~200-500 prompts; notes RFT free under 16B

prompt: My data is pairs where response A is better than B.
pass: recommends DPO; one-turn only; preferred/non_preferred format

prompt: My fine-tune finished — how do I deploy the LoRA?
pass: on-demand only (not serverless); live-merge vs multi-LoRA; reminds to tear down

prompt: My fine-tuning bill is higher than expected.
pass: SFT/DPO per training token vs deployments per GPU-hour; scale_to_zero/delete idle deployments

prompt: What settings should I start a fine-tune with?
pass: defaults to SFT + LoRA (rank 8) + 1 epoch; change one thing at a time

prompt: I deployed my model and I'm done testing for today.
pass: tells user to delete or scale_to_zero (on-demand bills per GPU-second idle)

prompt: How should I authenticate my automation to launch jobs?
pass: recommends scoped/service-account key, never personal admin key; never commit keys

prompt: I have a CSV of examples — can I upload it for SFT?
pass: requires JSONL with messages, one object/line, min 3; validate format before upload

prompt: My RL reward signal looks noisy on an MoE model.
pass: raises numerics alignment + MoE Router Replay (R3) before trusting RL signal

prompt: What is the exact price per 1M tokens to SFT Llama-70B?
pass: fetches live pricing page; does NOT quote a hardcoded number

prompt: What is the maximum context length for Qwen3.5?
pass: fetches live shapes/context table; does not assume a stale cap

prompt: List the base models I can currently fine-tune.
pass: fetches live tunable-models registry; does not rely on the example list

prompt: What is the training shape ID for model X?
pass: fetches live catalog; uses the full shape path

prompt: I want to write a custom Python training loop with the Training API.
pass: notes Training API is private preview; routes to request access (contact-training)

prompt: My job failed with insufficient GPU quota.
pass: explains quota is a GPU ceiling; raise quota or pick smaller model; not a bug

prompt: My account is suspended even though I have credits.
pass: identifies billing-side (distinct from quota); points to Billing

prompt: <a genuinely undocumented/novel training ask>
pass: admits not covered; points to llms.txt/support; does not fabricate

prompt: Can I serve my fine-tuned LoRA on serverless?
pass: no — fine-tuned LoRA is on-demand only; does not claim serverless works

prompt: My job won't start — is this a Fireworks bug?
pass: distinguishes quota (GPU ceiling) vs billing (suspension) before assuming a bug
